context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring of AdminPage.jsx completed successfully. The monolithic 1412-line file was split into 9 components: AdminLogin, AdminDashboard, AdminBookings, AdminContacts, TrainersManager, GalleryManager, ScheduleManager, SettingsManager, InstagramManager. All admin functionality preserved. CMS components (SectionsManager, PagesManager) imported from existing CMSManager.jsx. No functional changes - pure refactoring for maintainability.
